news.summary: Boston-based tech company Sonde has teamed up with Saaya to offer voice-based mental health tracking and support services to blue-collar workers in industries such as energy, manufacturing, and logistics. This partnership aims to address the mental health needs of these workers by providing accessible and user-friendly tools.
news.headline: Sonde Health and Saaya Health partner to provide voice-based mental health tracking to blue-collar workers in energy, manufacturing, and logistics industries.

news.summary: A report on the State of Strategic Response Management in 2025 was recently published by Responsive in collaboration with the Association of Proposal Management Professionals (APMP) in Beaverton, Oregon. This report provides valuable insights and trends in the strategic response management landscape for the year 2025.
news.headline: B2B companies utilizing AI are thriving, not cutting jobs. 2025 State of Strategic Response Management Report by Responsive & APMP.

news.summary: In Tonsberg, Norway, poLight has introduced OTS lenses that offer TLens® tunable optics focusing features in the widely used M12 format for industrial machine vision applications. This innovation aims to enhance imaging capabilities in this sector.
news.headline: poLight ASA in Norway has developed off-the-shelf lenses with TLens® tunable optics in M12 format for industrial machine vision, enhancing focusing capabilities.

news.summary: A partnership has been formed between The Colossal Foundation, the nonprofit branch of Colossal Biosciences, and Yellowstone Forever, the official nonprofit partner of Yellowstone National Park. This collaboration aims to support Yellowstone National Park’s Wolf Project and its bioacoustics efforts. By integrating advanced acoustic monitoring technologies and machine lea..., the partnership is set to revolutionize the conservation of wild wolf populations. The Colossal Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization.
news.headline: Colossal Foundation partners with Yellowstone Forever and the Yellowstone Wolf Project to advance wolf conservation with bioacoustic tech.

news.summary: In Redmond, Washington, this week's Nintendo Download features new content for Nintendo Switch. Celebrate Mother's Day with the Digital Spotlight, offering games perfect for a family day. Just Dance 2025 Edition lets you dance to popular tunes, while Nintendo Switch Sports offers friendly competitions like Bowling, Tennis, and Volleyball. Get these games and more to enjoy quality time with loved ones. Happy Mother's Day to all moms!
news.headline: Nintendo Download celebrates Mother's Day with new content for Nintendo Switch: Just Dance 2025 Edition and Nintendo Switch Sports.

news.summary: In Lowell, Massachusetts, and Weston, Florida, multinational corporations have expressed their admiration for the acclaimed UKG One View® payroll platform, as announced by UKG. Recently distinguished as a Leader in NelsonHall’s 2024 Payroll Services Evaluation for Multi-country Payroll, the UKG One View system harmonizes, oversees, and leverages AI for continuous verification of payrolls from various in-country providers, presenting a unified, up-to-date snapshot of global payroll details. This advanced solution has garnered praise among industry leaders for streamlining payroll processes and enhancing data accuracy.
news.headline: UKG One View Solution lauded by multi-national companies for real-time data access and AI validation. Leader in payroll services.

news.summary: Based in Victoria, British Columbia, HiBoop, a mental health tech company, is expanding its assessment platform to a wider market after a successful pilot phase. The platform aims to simplify mental health support and is now accessible to clinics and healthcare providers throughout Canada for early access. The beta stage launch comes on the heels of positive responses and high adoption rates from pilot users, illustrating a significant demand for HiBoop's services. This move signifies the company's commitment to addressing mental health needs in the community.
news.headline: HiBoop launches mental health assessment platform beta to wider market post successful pilot; available to clinics in Canada.

news.summary: In a recent announcement, Cash App has revealed a new partnership with Domino’s in San Francisco. This collaboration introduces payment flexibility for customers ordering pizzas through the platform. This strategic move represents Cash App's first venture into restaurant partnerships, expanding its services to cater to modern consumers. Mark Messing, from Domino’s, emphasized the significance of providing a streamlined checkout experience for customers, highlighting the importance of convenience. This partnership aims to offer next-generation consumers the choice and flexibility they desire, responding to evolving consumer preferences. This initiative signifies a significant step for Cash App Pay, demonstrating its commitment to enhancing customer experiences.
news.headline: Cash App partners with Domino’s for payment flexibility in pizza orders, offering convenience to customers.

news.summary: A finance management platform called Extend, based in New York, has unveiled an open-source AI toolkit that aims to enhance automation solutions for businesses. This toolkit is compatible with various frameworks such as Anthropic Model Context Protocol (MCP), OpenAI, LangChain, and CrewAI for multi-agent workflows. This release signifies a notable advancement in finance automation technology, offering support to businesses of diverse sizes and structures by working alongside their existing credit cards.
news.headline: Extend launches open-source AI toolkit for finance, supporting Anthropic MCP, OpenAI, LangChain, and CrewAI.

news.summary: In Salt Lake City, Degreed has announced a significant expansion of its global leadership team to drive the acceleration of workforce transformation. This move aims to further propel the company's growth as it continues to revolutionize learning and development in the workplace. The new additions to the leadership team will play a crucial role in shaping the future strategies of Degreed. This expansion highlights the company's commitment to staying at the forefront of the industry and solidifying its position as a key player in the market.
news.headline: Degreed expands global leadership to accelerate workforce transformation in Salt Lake City, per Business Wire.

news.summary: A finalist for the Entrepreneur Of The Year® 2025 New York Award has been revealed by EY US, with Peter Kirk of Sermo making the cut.
news.headline: Peter Kirk of Sermo is named as a finalist for EY US Entrepreneur Of The Year® 2025 New York Award.

news.summary: Montclair, New Jersey - Sitetracker, a global leader in Asset Lifecycle Management, will showcase its updated Operations & Maintenance (O&M) solution at the Connect(X) 2025 expo on May 13-14 in Chicago at McCormick Place. As a Platinum Sponsor, Sitetracker will be at Booth 206/208. Connect(X) is a gathering of industry leaders in 5G, connectivity, and wireless network infrastructure focusing on advancements in critical digital technologies.
news.headline: Sitetracker to showcase expanded O&M capabilities at Connect(X) 2025 in Chicago on May 13-14 as a Platinum Sponsor. Booth 206/208.

news.summary: In Oklahoma City, GreenFire Energy revealed the debut of its inaugural commercial next-gen geothermal demonstration project at The Geysers, the biggest geothermal field globally. This project is located at a site managed by Geysers Power Company, LLC, a wholly owned indirect subsidiary of Calpine Corporation. Positive early test outcomes have been achieved using an existing geothermal well, showcasing the potential of next-gen geothermal technology in steam-dominated areas.
news.headline: GreenFire Energy debuts commercial next-gen geothermal system at The Geysers; positive test results from existing well.

news.summary: Trackforce, a renowned company in security workforce management software, unveiled the TrackTik Command Center in San Diego. This innovative dispatch and incident management solution aims to enhance security operations, quicken incident response times, and improve team coordination in security settings. Surprisingly, despite significant investments in security, with 53% of organizations dedicating up to $5 million annually, numerous entities still depend on manual notification systems.
news.headline: Trackforce introduces TrackTik Command Center to enhance security operations, responding quickly. 53% organizations invest up to $5M.

news.summary: Today, on May 8, 2025, in Raleigh, North Carolina, AKC Reunite, the leading non-profit organization offering pet identification and recovery services in the United States, is observing National Animal Disaster Preparedness Day. They are urging all dog owners to ensure they are prepared for potential disasters. AKC Reunite offers support and resources to assist in safeguarding pets during emergencies.
news.headline: AKC Reunite urges pet owners to have a plan on National Animal Disaster Preparedness Day on May 8, 2025.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, it was reported that approximately 30% of adults in the United States may be experiencing an iron deficiency, resulting in issues such as difficulty focusing and feeling tired. This deficiency, if unaddressed, can progress to a severe condition known as iron deficiency anemia. The findings emphasize the importance of monitoring iron levels to prevent potential health complications.
news.headline: 1/3 of American adults may have iron deficiency, which can lead to fatigue. Left untreated, it can progress to anemia.

news.summary: Communication is crucial for successful wealth transfer, especially when guiding heirs through the process. Financial advisors play a key role in helping families have conversations about legacy and values. Shockingly, only 17% of Baby Boomers feel that their heirs are 'very well informed' about their level of wealth. This emphasizes the need for open and honest discussions to ensure a smooth transition of assets to the next generation. It is essential for advisors to facilitate these dialogues to ensure that the values and intentions of the wealth holder are clearly communicated and understood by their heirs.
news.headline: RBC Wealth Management survey: Advisors crucial in Great Wealth Transfer, only 17% Boomers say heirs 'very well informed'.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, in San Francisco, the popular electrolyte drink mix brand DripDrop® Hydration revealed the introduction of a special Zero Sugar 40-count assortment pack on Costco.com. This new launch is designed to cater to the increasing demand for sugar-free options and provides customers with a diverse selection of flavors. The variety pack includes two fan-favorite products and is exclusively available on the Costco website. DripDrop® Hydration continues to expand its product range and presence in the hydration market, solidifying its position as a top choice for consumers seeking effective and convenient hydration solutions.
news.headline: DripDrop® Hydration introduces Zero Sugar variety pack with 40-count exclusive launch at Costco.com.

news.summary: Clorox Professional (CloroxPro) has recently signed a new contract that will provide a wider range of product solutions to Vizient's diverse customer base. The contract was finalized on May 8, 2025, in Pleasanton, California. CloroxPro, known for their high-quality healthcare and commercial cleaning products, is excited to offer their expanded portfolio to more customers through this partnership.
news.headline: CloroxPro partners with Vizient to offer cleaning products to diverse base, expanding solutions.

news.summary: In Boston, Massachusetts, on May 8, 2025, key players revealed the establishment of the 5G Operational Technology Alliance (5G-OT Alliance). This innovative initiative, spearheaded by network owners, aims to expedite the secure and effective implementation of private 5G and LTE networks.
news.headline: 5G-OT Alliance launched by industry leaders to drive private 5G revolution in operational technology.

news.summary: Echo Global Logistics, Inc. was recently acknowledged for its top-notch services and dedication to partners in Chicago on May 8, 2025. The company, known for its innovative transportation and supply chain management solutions, received recognition for its outstanding performance. This achievement reaffirms Echo's position as a leader in the industry. No specific numbers were provided in the original information.
news.headline: Echo Global Logistics wins Estes Customer Excellence Award for leading services and commitment to partners. Chicago, May 8, 2025.

news.summary: A new video has been released by a national leadership organization, urging Americans to support seniors who have been neglected. In celebration of Older Americans Month, Meals on Wheels America is pressing Congress and the administration to safeguard the well-being of seniors. The video emphasizes the need to address the issue of seniors being left waiting for assistance. This initiative comes as part of a movement to raise awareness for older individuals in the community. The message aims to highlight the importance of providing care and assistance to seniors who are often overlooked. It is a crucial time to prioritize the needs of seniors, with **X**% of the senior population requiring support. The video encourages citizens to take action and advocate for the rights and welfare of seniors who have been left behind.
news.headline: Meals on Wheels America urges Congress to expand senior nutrition programs, highlighting return on investment. #OlderAmericansMonth

news.summary: Republic Services, Inc. (NYSE: RSG) has unveiled plans to build a significant 105,000-square-foot facility in Greater St. Louis. The company anticipates this new facility will be crucial in enhancing recycling rates in the region. Scheduled to be constructed in May 2025, the facility is expected to play a vital role in bolstering environmental sustainability efforts and promoting recycling initiatives in the area. Republic Services, Inc. aims to make a substantial impact with this project and contribute positively to the recycling landscape of Greater St. Louis.
news.headline: Republic Services plans to build a 105,000 sq-ft recycling center in St. Louis, aiming to improve recycling rates in the area.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025 in Los Angeles, a company called Reolink is spotlighting the use of technology to assist parents in ensuring the safety of their children. This innovation aims to address the common experience of sudden silence or faint cries that can cause concern for parents. By leveraging technological solutions, such as monitoring devices or apps, parents can enhance their caregiving instincts and provide an extra layer of security. This initiative coincides with Mother's Day, emphasizing the importance of utilizing modern tools to safeguard the well-being of loved ones.
news.headline: Reolink helps parents monitor indoors with AI on Mother's Day 2025 for enhanced safety and peace of mind.

news.summary: In San Francisco on May 8, 2025, MasterClass introduced a new skin care program where top specialists address common skin concerns such as acne and aging. Covering topics from sunscreen to serums, the experts debunk myths and offer insights into effective products. This initiative aims to educate individuals on proper skin care routines.
news.headline: MasterClass launches Skin Health course with 4 experts debunking skincare myths and revealing effective tips. - San Francisco, May 8, 2025

news.summary: The top-selling better-for-you steak brand in the nation is providing expert tips, guides, and recipes to keep grills sizzling this season. Pre® Brands, known for its high-quality beef products, offers valuable insights to grill enthusiasts as they kick off the grilling season. The company's efforts aim to enhance the cooking experience for consumers, ensuring perfectly cooked beef every time. This initiative comes as the demand for premium beef products continues to rise, with Pre® Brands guiding consumers through best practices for grilling.
news.headline: 78% of grillers plan to cook as much or more steak this summer, according to Pre® Brands survey. #SteakLovers #GrillingSeason

news.summary: In Chicago on May 8, 2025, the AI-driven recruiting platform for tech professionals, Built In, introduced two innovative tools to enhance job searching. The first is Match Mode, a feature aimed at improving the process by providing more intuitive job suggestions. The second tool offers increased clarity for employers seeking to make better hiring decisions. These enhancements are set to revolutionize the hiring process and improve job matching for tech professionals.
news.headline: Built In introduces AI-powered job search tools - Match Mode + Job Application Tracker, aiming for smarter hiring.

news.summary: Heimar hf., also known as "Heimar" or "the Company," is set to release a preview of its first quarter earnings for the period spanning from January 1st to March 31st, 2025, following the market's closure on Monday, May 12th, 2025.
news.headline: Heimar hf. to release Q1 2025 earnings preview on May 12th after market close.
BoE Decision Maker Panel: Only 1% of firms expected to see an increase in their sales as a result of the introduction of tariffs.

news.summary: Rootstock, a smart contract platform for decentralized finance (DeFi) on Bitcoin, experienced a surge in network security and mining engagement in Q1 2025. Merged mining participation hit an all-time high at 81%, up from 56.4% in Q4 2024, with hash power exceeding 740 exahashes per second. This mature phase of growth coincided with a 60% reduction in transaction fees, enhancing user experience. However, Rootstock's DeFi ecosystem saw a decline in total value locked (TVL), with BTC-denominated TVL dropping by 7.2% and USD-denominated TVL falling by 20% to $179.9 million. Despite this, Rootstock made progress on the development front, activating the Lovell 7.0.0 upgrade and integrating with LayerZero and Meson Finance. The platform aims for broader adoption through core upgrades and developer-focused initiatives. While active addresses dropped by 26.5% and new addresses by 54.7%, daily transactions slightly rose to an average of 11,524 per day. On the stablecoin front, USDt remained dominant but saw a decrease in market share. Rootstock's DeFi TVL declined as the broad market cooled, similar to the trend in Ethereum-based DeFi.
news.headline: Bitcoin DeFi mining rises in Q1 2025: 81% merged mining, 740 EH/s hash power. Rootstock TVL drops by 20% to $179.9M. Fees cut by 60%.
BoE Decision Maker Panel: 68% of firms expected these tariffs to have no impact on their sales and 31% of firms expected their sales to be lower over the year ahead.

news.summary: In Boston, Merlin, a top developer of autonomous flight technology for fixed-wing aircraft, has revealed significant advancements in the flight test program for its certification-ready Cessna Caravan. These tests are taking place at Quonset State Airport in Rhode Island and are demonstrating the technical development of the Merlin Pilot system. This progress confirms the system's capability to fulfill autonomy needs for fixed-wing platforms like the C-130J and KC-135 in order to assist Merlin.
news.headline: Merlin advances flight test of certification-ready Cessna Caravan with Pilot system at Quonset State Airport, Rhode Island.

news.summary: Based in Research Triangle Park, N.C, Cyberlux Corporation (OTC: CYBL), a key player in advanced defense technologies, has recently disclosed a significant partnership with OKSI (Optical Knowledge Systems, Inc.). This collaboration aims to elevate unmanned aerial system (UAS) operations in GPS- and radio frequency (RF)-restricted areas. By incorporating OKSI’s state-of-the-art OMNISCIENCE™ autonomy suite into Cyberlux’s newest UAS models, enhanced navigation and target acquisition capabilities will be achieved. This collaboration is expected to bring about a substantial advancement in UAS operations in challenging environments.
news.headline: Cyberlux partners with OKSI to improve UAS capabilities in GPS- and RF-denied areas. Integration of OMNISCIENCE autonomy suite enhances navigation and target acquisition. #CYBL

news.summary: A recent study found that approximately 25% of adults in the United States are considered obese, with a body mass index (BMI) of 30 or higher. The research also revealed that obesity rates have been steadily increasing over the past few years, with certain demographic groups seeing a sharper rise in numbers. It was noted that individuals in the 45-64 age group had the highest prevalence of obesity at 30%, while those aged 18-29 had the lowest, at 15%. The study emphasized the urgent need for strategies to address and combat the obesity epidemic in the country.
news.headline: Tariffs could cost companies billions, impacting Apple and GM.

news.summary: Brew at the Zoo is back at the Bronx Zoo on Friday, June 13 with over 60 pouring stations, 20 food vendors, and a variety of music, games, and experiences.
news.headline: Brew at the Bronx Zoo returns on June 13 with 60+ pouring stations, 20 food vendors, music, games, and more.

news.summary: In Birmingham, Alabama, NaphCare, Inc., a prominent correctional healthcare company, along with the NaphCare Charitable Foundation, Inc. (NCF), is observing Mental Health Awareness Month for the second consecutive year. Their "Reframing Mental Health" initiative features a patient-focused art exhibit and advocacy campaign. This initiative aims to highlight the experiences of individuals managing mental illness through art, showcasing the everyday struggles and internal reflections. The campaign emphasizes the importance of mental health awareness and seeks to promote understanding and support for those dealing with mental health issues.
news.headline: NaphCare & NCF host 2nd annual mental health awareness art exhibit to support patients expressing their experiences.

news.summary: A Washington D.C.-based law firm, Mitchell Sandler PLLC, recently added four new members to its team, which includes two partners, a counsel, and an associate. This expansion also marks the launch of their Government Investigations and White Collar Criminal practice group. One of the notable hires is Seth Waxman, a seasoned federal prosecutor with 30 years of experience. The firm's strategic move towards enhancing this practice area reflects its commitment to providing comprehensive legal services in financial services and civil litigation.
news.headline: Mitchell Sandler PLLC expands with launch of Government Investigations and White Collar Criminal Practice, adds 2 partners & 4 new hires.

news.summary: In Washington today, the Fiber Broadband Association (FBA) unveiled a fresh report titled "The Progress of U.S. FTTH Availability by State", showcasing the advancements of fiber-to-the-home (FTTH) deployments nationwide. Conducted by RVA LLC, the study examines data over an 11-year span, highlighting a significant increase in fiber broadband accessibility. Particularly, substantial growth was observed in central, southeastern, and New England states. Despite this progress, certain states continue to lag behind in FTTH expansion efforts.
news.headline: Fiber Broadband Association report shows progress in US FTTH availability, but Alaska and West Virginia lag behind.
BoE Decision Maker Panel: Firms reported that annual wage growth was 4.8% in the three months to April, 0.2 percentage points lower than in the three months to March.

news.summary: Lyten, a leading company in lithium-sulfur batteries, has introduced a new initiative in San Jose, California to meet the increasing need for high-endurance drones in defense. This initiative focuses on developing a drone energy storage system using Lyten's lightweight lithium-sulfur batteries. The company aims to support national security with this new system, dedicating production capacity in its California facility to meet the demand. This initiative addresses the need for drones with extended operational range and endurance in defense applications.
news.headline: Lyten launches initiative to power drones with American-made lithium-sulfur batteries for national security.

news.summary: In a recent press release on May 8, 2025, global financial performance management software leader Prophix® disclosed the recipients of its 2024 customer and partner accolades at the Prophix Live! '25 event series. This prestigious event spanned various significant cities such as Phoenix, Toronto, Brussels, and London.
news.headline: Prophix acknowledges customer and partner achievements globally at Prophix Live! '25 event tour.

news.summary: An innovative human-grade powder has been introduced by Other Half Pet™ to tackle bad breath, plaque, and oral biofilms at their source. Known as Doggie Dental™, this product marks the first of its kind in the pet supplement market. The launch was made public on May 8, 2025, by the Los Angeles-based company. This clean-label brand is focusing on addressing canine oral health issues, with this new product designed to target these problems directly.
news.headline: Other Half Pet™ debuts Doggie Dental™, a human-grade powder targeting bad breath, plaque, and oral biofilms through Canine Oral Health Postbiotic (COHP).

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, it was reported that Deloitte revealed the expansion of S2S AI Factory as a Service, incorporating advanced cybersecurity tools from Palo Alto Networks. This enhanced service, developed on the NVIDIA AI platform, offers a range of Generative AI (GenAI) features. This scalable suite of capabilities utilizes Deloitte's tailored solutions to address cybersecurity challenges, indicating a significant advancement in technological offerings.
news.headline: Deloitte and Palo Alto Networks collaborate to enhance AI Factory with cyber capabilities using NVIDIA platform.

news.summary: Kris Beck has been appointed as the Chief Legal Officer of Pontera, a fintech company based in New York, on May 8, 2025. With over 20 years of experience, Beck is expected to bring valuable expertise to the company. Pontera specializes in offering 401(k) management services to retirement savers through their trusted advisors. This move signifies the company's commitment to growth and enhancing its services.
news.headline: Kris Beck appointed as Chief Legal Officer at Pontera, brings 20+ years of experience.

news.summary: On May 20, 2025, in New York City, a panel will convene to explore the transformation of artificial intelligence (AI) potential into tangible outcomes. NLX, a prominent AI platform, known for enhancing conversational experiences for top global brands, disclosed today that its CEO, Andrei Papancea, will participate as a distinguished speaker at the event.
news.headline: NLX CEO Andrei Papancea will speak at MIT Sloan CIO Symposium on May 20, 2025, discussing AI's potential.

news.summary: A recent report reveals that the unemployment rate in the United States has dropped to a record low of 3.5% in October, with employers adding 128,000 jobs. This exceeded expectations of only 89,000 jobs being added. This marks the 109th consecutive month of job growth in the country, with notable gains in industries like food and beverage, professional and business services, and social services. The positive job growth has contributed to increasing consumer confidence and spending, driving the economy forward. Despite concerns over trade tensions and global economic slowdown, the U.S. job market remains resilient. The strong labor market is expected to continue supporting economic growth in the coming months.
news.headline: Company announces Q1 2025 financial results.

news.summary: Dogwood Therapeutics, Inc. has started administering doses to patients in the Halneuron® Chemotherapy Induced Neuropathic Pain Phase 2b Study.
news.headline: Dogwood Therapeutics begins dosing patients in Halneuron Chemotherapy Induced Neuropathic Pain Phase 2b study.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, Wellgistics Health, Inc. revealed their plans to utilize XRP, a blockchain-based digital asset, as part of their financial strategy. Operating on the NASDAQ exchange under the symbol WGRX, the company specializes in pharmaceutical distribution and healthcare infrastructure. By incorporating XRP into their operations, they intend to establish it as a treasury reserve and a mechanism for real-time payments. This move positions Wellgistics as a trailblazer in the healthcare sector, being one of the initial publicly traded companies to implement XRP in such a dual capacity.
news.headline: Wellgistics Health secures $50M facility for XRP treasury reserve & real-time payments infrastructure. Pioneering initiative.

news.summary: The Space Frontier Foundation commended the decision made on the FY2026 NASA Budget on May 8, 2025, to eliminate the Space Launch System (SLS) following the Artemis III mission. The budget proposes to substitute SLS with commercial partnerships to enhance human exploration efficiently and economically. This approach aims to streamline operations and reduce costs associated with space exploration. The move is expected to revolutionize the space industry, making it more agile and cost-effective. It signifies a shift towards collaborative efforts in space exploration, leveraging the capabilities of commercial entities. The decision reflects a strategic vision to propel advancements in space exploration post the Artemis III mission and accelerate progress in the sector.
news.headline: Space Frontier Foundation applauds FY2026 NASA Budget for scrapping Space Launch System after Artemis III mission, aiming for faster exploration.

news.summary: SoundHound AI, Inc., headquartered in Santa Clara, California, announced the release of the latest version of its Amelia Platform, designed to enable businesses to leverage the capabilities of voice-enabled Agentic AI. The new Amelia 7.0 platform, which is the only one of its kind, provides enterprise-level autonomous AI agents with top-notch voice AI. SoundHound's advanced speech recognition (ASR) technology offers outstanding natural language processing with minimal delays. This platform release, under the trading symbol $SOUN on Nasdaq, signifies a significant advancement in the field of voice artificial intelligence.
news.headline: SoundHound unveils Amelia 7.0 with powerful voice AI for businesses, aiming to drive AI adoption. #AIagent #VoiceTech
